caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or interview titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with the text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK." The setting appears to be a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes, mannequins, and framed photographs on the wall behind him. The man is gesturing with his hands while speaking, indicating that he is engaged in an animated conversation. The environment suggests a casual yet professional atmosphere, combining elements of retail and media production.
